title: pelexia neottiorhiza
intro: Pelexia neottiorhiza is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, commonly known as "orchid of death" due to its unique and striking appearance. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelexia neottiorhiza include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
